entries.name: Executor
entries.description: Used to execute LayerZero message payloads at the destination. Also manages fee logic, gas drop and access control.

receivedPermissions.description: execute rsETH OFT messages sent to Unichain through LayerZero.

entries.name: EndpointV2
entries.description: Part of the LayerZero messaging protocol. The rsETH OFT adapter owner can configure custom receive libraries and verification settings here.

rsETHAdapterDelegate.description: The address delegated by the rsETH OFT adapter to configure its LayerZero endpoint settings.

rsETHReceiveLibraryFromUnichain.description: The receive MessageLib used by the Ethereum rsETH OFT adapter for messages from its Unichain peer.

rsETHSendLibraryToUnichain.description: The send MessageLib used by the Ethereum rsETH OFT adapter for messages to its Unichain peer.

entries.name: BlockedMessageLib
entries.description: Simple LayerZero library that blocks all messages if configured.

entries.name: Horizen DVN
entries.description: Defines the logic that validates LayerZero Packets for this DVN.

receivedPermissions.description: verify rsETH OFT messages sent to Unichain through LayerZero.
verify rsETH OFT messages sent from Unichain through LayerZero.

entries.name: LayerZero DVN
entries.description: Defines the logic that validates LayerZero Packets for this DVN.

receivedPermissions.description: verify rsETH OFT messages sent to Unichain through LayerZero.
verify rsETH OFT messages sent from Unichain through LayerZero.

entries.name: ReadLib1002
entries.description: LayerZero library used to read state from remote blockchains.

entries.name: RsETHOFTAdapter
entries.description: An OApp in the LayerZero protocol that adapts an existing ERC20 token into the OFT standard. Its owner can configure peers and LayerZero security settings for connected routes.

peerUnichain.description: The configured peer for the rsETH OFT route from Unichain.

entries.name: Canary DVN
entries.description: Defines the logic that validates LayerZero Packets for this DVN.

receivedPermissions.description: verify rsETH OFT messages sent to Unichain through LayerZero.
verify rsETH OFT messages sent from Unichain through LayerZero.

entries.name: Netherming DVN
entries.description: Defines the logic that validates LayerZero Packets for this DVN.

receivedPermissions.description: verify rsETH OFT messages sent to Unichain through LayerZero.
verify rsETH OFT messages sent from Unichain through LayerZero.

entries.name: SendUln302
entries.description: Send Library used by LayerZero, defining the protocol/execution of sent messages.

getUlnConfig.description: The verification config of the Ethereum rsETH OFT adapter for messages sent to Unichain. Returns confirmations, required DVNs, optional DVNs, and the optional DVN threshold.

getExecutorConfig.description: The executor config of the Ethereum rsETH OFT adapter for messages sent to Unichain. Returns max message size and executor.

entries.name: LayerZero Multisig
entries.description: Custom multisignature contract allowing offchain signing and execution on multiple target chains.

receivedPermissions.description: configure the default send/receive libraries used for verification, affecting all OApps that have not set up a custom security config.
configure the settings of this library, affecting all OApps that have not set up a custom security config.
configure the settings of this library, affecting all OApps that have not set up a custom security config.
configure the settings of this library, affecting all OApps that have not set up a custom security config.

executorRequired.description: if true, only executor OR any signer can execute a correctly signed tx. else anyone can.

entries.name: ReceiveUln302
entries.description: LayerZero-deployed receive library, defining the validation of received messages.

getUlnConfig.description: The verification config of the Ethereum rsETH OFT adapter for messages coming from Unichain. Returns confirmations, required DVNs, optional DVNs, and the optional DVN threshold.

receivedPermissions.description: manage all settings of the LZ crosschain security stack for the respective OApp: change libraries, DVN configs etc.
can configure the OFT adapter, including LayerZero peer and delegate settings.
